2606.16353.title: What Should a Streaming Video Model Remember?
2606.16353.paper_summary: Streaming video understanding models must answer queries at any moment during an ongoing stream, using only what they have observed so far and under fixed memory and computation budgets. Existing methods address this by adding memory banks, retrieval modules, or visual token compression to preserve long-range history. However, strong recent-window baselines show that indiscriminate history injection can dilute current-scene perception, suggesting that the key challenge is not whether to use memory, but how to allocate it selectively. We formulate this as budgeted online latent evidence allocation and propose \textbf{SelectStream}, a selective latent-memory framework that keeps the current observation directly visible to a frozen VLM while exposing historical information only through a compact, query-conditioned evidence budget. Three coordinated mechanisms govern when to write, what to preserve, and how to retrieve: surprise-driven adaptive windowing, priority-preserving consolidation, and query-conditioned graph reasoning over a fixed-capacity latent memory graph. Retrieved evidence is calibrated and injected as latent tokens for answer generation, without replaying frames or growing the context with stream length. Experimental results show that SelectStream achieves strong online streaming performance and preserves general video understanding, reaching 82.67\% on StreamingBench, 67.03\% on OVO-Bench, and 74.4\% average accuracy on offline video benchmarks, while outperforming strong recent-window baselines and prior streaming memory methods.
2606.16353.paper_summary_zh: 流媒體視頻理解模型必須在持續流媒體的任何時刻回答查詢，僅使用他們到目前為止觀察到的內容，並在固定的記憶和計算預算下進行操作。現有的方法通過增加記憶庫、檢索模塊或視覺標記壓縮來解決這個問題，以保留長期歷史。然而，強大的近期窗口基準顯示，無差別的歷史注入可能會稀釋當前場景的感知，這表明關鍵挑戰不在於是否使用記憶，而在於如何選擇性地分配它。我們將此公式化為預算化的在線潛在證據分配，並提出\textbf{SelectStream}，這是一個選擇性潛在記憶框架，能夠將當前觀察直接顯示給一個靜態的VLM，同時僅通過一個緊湊的、查詢條件的證據預算來暴露歷史信息。三個協調機制決定何時寫入、保留什麼以及如何檢索：驚訝驅動的自適應窗口、優先級保留的整合，以及在固定容量潛在記憶圖上的查詢條件圖推理。檢索到的證據被校準並作為潛在標記注入以生成答案，而無需重播幀或隨著流長度增長上下文。實驗結果顯示，SelectStream實現了強大的在線流媒體性能，並保留了一般視頻理解，在StreamingBench上達到82.67\%、在OVO-Bench上達到67.03\%、在離線視頻基準上達到74.4\%的平均準確率，同時超越了強大的近期窗口基準和先前的流媒體記憶方法。
2606.16353.author: Haonan Ge et.al.
2606.16353.authors: Haonan Ge, Yiwei Wang, Hang Wu, Yujun Cai
